ai_prompt_hint: This is a Shohei Ohtani baseball card from Japan. Focus on: card brand (Topps/Bowman/BBM/Epoch), year, RC status, grading (PSA/BGS), parallel type (Refractor/Chrome/Numbered), and autograph authenticity. Title must include 'Shohei Ohtani' at the front. Never use Pokemon or One Piece related words.
